caption: A person with a beard and a dark baseball cap is seen in a small video window on the right side of a screen share. The main screen displays a digital document titled "Rural Community Food System" with the heading "13R Retailers willing to source Local & Product Cost/Price." The text describes retailers' willingness to source local products relative to demand and the "Product Cost" to improve local consumption. A complex causal loop diagram with green lines and arrows is visible on the right side of the document. In the upper portion of the screen, a web browser is open with multiple tabs, including one titled "R Learning by Learning by SystemDynamics." As the sequence progresses, a mouse cursor moves across the screen, and a dropdown menu appears, highlighting a list of items including "Changing Mental Models," "Changing Components," and "Innovation."
